Beginner's Guide 📘

Android 📱

Software 💾

Useful 🔧

Games 🎮

Developer 👨‍💻

Unsafe ⚠️

On this page

Software ​

Must-have apps for security, productivity, and media.

Essential Apps ​

Browsers

  • Firefox - must have ublock extension

  • Brave - inbuilt adblocker, debloat guide

Privacy & Security

  • MalwareBytes - antivirus

  • Proton - VPN

One can use package manager(s) like winget, scoop, chocolatey for updating apps like mpv, 7zip, vlc, hugo, etc

package managers automate installation, updates, and dependency handling, saving time and effort + they allow bulk installs and easy version control, which manual .exe or .msi downloads can’t.

if you have to choose one, I would go with scoop, make sure its maintained by genuine source and is updated often.

File Management

  • 7zip - file archiver

  • Advanced Renamer, Bulk Renamer - bulk renamer

Media Players

  • MPV - media player

  • VLC - media player

Optional/Utility Apps ​

  • Adobe Alternatives - list of alternatives for Adobe software

  • Flameshot - better screenshot tool

  • YTdlp - installation guide - audio/video downloader

  • ShareX - screenshot tool with extensive features

  • Bleachbit - clean your system and disk space

  • Revo Uninstaller - completely uninstall programs and registry

  • AB Download Manager - download manager for speeding up download(s)

  • Jdownloader - another download manager, suitable for batch downloads

  • Local Send - file sharing to nearby devices

  • Notepad++ - better notepad

  • Vesktop - modified discord client

  • Downloaders & Torrents

    • Qbittorrent - best torrent client

    • Nyaa - Anime torrents

Cracks ​

Turn off antivirus before installation of Cracks software or Game Repacks

It's recommended to turn it off because it may flag the crack and just delete it. Imagine waiting an hour or more for it to install, and having the antivirus delete the crack making the game unplayable.

  • Cracksurl, Lrepacks - general software

  • Monkrus, 2, 3 - adobe products

  • Rutracker - extensive software
